entities.description: As a subsection of 'MQTT通信协议简介', this section provides instructions on the installation of the Mosquitto tool, which is a widely used MQTT broker for message brokering in IoT applications.
An open-source MQTT broker used for publishing and subscribing to messages in IoT and messaging systems, discussed in section 1.3.
Refers to the process of installing software tools, specifically the Mosquitto MQTT broker, as outlined in section 1.3.

relations.description: The concept of 'Mosquitto' is a primary topic of section 1.3.
The concept of '工具安装' (tool installation) is a primary topic of section 1.3.
